linguistic.title: Linguistic
linguistic.desc: Word play, verbal reasoning, storytelling, and argumentation.

logical.title: Logical-Mathematical
logical.desc: Pattern recognition, abstract reasoning, and numerical problem-solving.

spatial.title: Spatial
spatial.desc: Mental rotation, visualization, and spatial reasoning.

musical.title: Musical
musical.desc: Rhythm recognition, auditory memory, and pattern detection in sound.

interpersonal.title: Interpersonal
interpersonal.desc: Reading people, empathy, social reasoning, and persuasion.

naturalistic.title: Naturalistic
naturalistic.desc: Pattern recognition in nature and complex systems, classification, and ecological reasoning.

learningStyle.linguistic: You learn best through reading, writing, and discussion of structured language.
learningStyle.logical: You learn best through structured argument, models, and explicit reasoning.
learningStyle.spatial: You learn best through diagrams, maps, and visualizing structure.
learningStyle.musical: You learn best through rhythm, sound patterns, and timed structure.
learningStyle.bodily: You learn best by doing — hands-on repetition and physical engagement.
learningStyle.interpersonal: You learn best through dialogue, role-play, and teaching others.
learningStyle.intrapersonal: You learn best through reflection, journaling, and self-paced study.
learningStyle.naturalistic: You learn best through classification, field observation, and comparing cases.

flatNote: Your profile is fairly evenly spread across intelligence types. This is a real cognitive versatility — useful in early-stage ventures where roles are fluid and the right people for each task are scarce.

shareTexts.invite: What type of intelligence do you have?
shareTexts.minimal: My primary intelligence is {primary}. What is yours?
shareTexts.full:
My cognitive profile is {primary} + {secondary}.
What type of intelligence do you have?

attribution: Inspired by Howard Gardner’s Multiple Intelligences theory. This is not an IQ test and does not measure general intelligence. Items are original.

recommendation.label: Outfinity initiative
recommendation.title: Explorer Circle
recommendation.text: Explorer Circle is a community for builders comparing their cognitive profiles and teaming up with people whose intelligences complement. You do not need to share your result to participate.
recommendation.note: Opening Explorer Circle takes you to Substack. Your result is not transmitted.
